short_desc: If DEMENTED=1 then CLINSTAGE should not equal 0, 1 or 2
full_desc: If Form D1a Q3. DEMENTED (Demented) = 1 (Yes) then Form D1c. Q10. CLINSTAGE (Clinical AD stage) should not equal 0, 1 or 2 (Asymptomatic or transitional decline)

short_desc: If CDRGLOB=3 then CLINSTAGE should not equal 0, 1 or 2
full_desc: If Form B4 Q8. CDRGLOB (CDR global score)=3 (Severe impairment) then Form D1c. Q10. CLINSTAGE (Clinical AD stage) should not equal 0, 1 or 2 (Asymptomatic or transitional decline)

short_desc: If NORMCOG=1 then CLINSTAGE should not equal 4, 5, or 6
full_desc: If Form D1a Q2. NORMCOG (Normal cognition) =1 (Yes) then Form D1c. Q10. CLINSTAGE (Clinical AD stage) should not equal 4, 5 or 6 (Dementia with mild, moderate or severe functional impairment)

short_desc: If CDRGLOB=3 then CLINSTAGE should not equal 4, 5, or 6
full_desc: If Form B4 Q8. CDRGLOB (CDR global score)=0 (No impairment) then Form D1c. Q10. CLINSTAGE (Clinical AD stage) should not equal 4, 5 or 6 (Dementia with mild, moderate or severe functional impairment)

short_desc: If CLINSTAGE[prev_vis]=6 then CLINSTAGE should not equal 0
full_desc: If Q10. CLINSTAGE (Clinical AD stage) = 6 (Dementia with severe functional impairment) at the previous visit, then Q10. CLINSTAGE (Clinical AD stage) should not equal 0 (No impairment)
